title: Preserve Group 21 status: G21-1: A-sector mass charge
description: Result: M_A = c^2 F_A/(8*pi*G) is the current reduced ordinary-exterior reference charge; for A = 1 - 2GM/(c^2 r), M_A = M. Status: CLOSED_REDUCED. Consequence: A carries the ordinary exterior mass coin in the current reduced branch. Handoff: all non-A sectors are audited against delta M_A = 0 unless a future parent identity redefines mass.
